text:
King White Stag Beetle (キングホワイトオオクワガタ, Kingu Howaito Ōkuwagata) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

King White Stag Beetle キングホワイトオオクワガタ - This card contains a King White Stag Beetle in card form. It lives in very big and tall trees. It uses special pheromones in order to gather together and build a huge colony of other insects. It is believed that it leaves the colony once a day for an evening stroll.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.053 :: キングホワイトオオクワガタ 
伝説の昆虫。特殊なフェロモンで他の昆虫を誘惑し働かせ、一大コロニーを作り上げる。唯一コロニーの外へ出るのは夕方の散歩。
|-
![Eng]
|No.053 :: King White Stag Beetle 
A legendary insect. It uses special pheromones to lure other insects to build a huge colony. It leaves the colony once a day for an evening stroll.
|}

Trivia

Gon punches the Big Tree and knocks 3 of these beetles out on his first try.
